revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:深谷まつり]]
{{ Image Requests|date=2015th year 7月10日 (金) 11:43 (UTC)|cat={{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|qid=Q734532|lt=Fukaya, Saitama|1=Fukaya, Saitama}}|cat2=7月|イベントの様子}} {{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称 = {{ill|Fukaya Festival|ja|深谷まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukaya Festival|qq=}} |種類 = {{ill|Mikoshi|en|Mikoshi|qid=Q979940|lt=Mikoshi|1=Mikoshi}} {{ill|Parade|en|Parade|qid=Q657449|lt=Parade|1=Parade}} |image = |image説明 = {{ill|Fukaya Festival|ja|深谷まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukaya Festival|qq=}} |開催時期 = 毎年7月の最終土曜日 |初回開催 = [[1681]]ごろ（{{ill|Tenna (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442381}}1st year ） |会場 = {{ill|Fukaya Station|en|Fukaya Station|qid=Q844895|lt=Fukaya Station|1=Fukaya Station}}北口周辺 |主催 = {{ill|Fukaya City Tourism Association|ja|深谷市観光協会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukaya City Tourism Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |最寄駅 ={{ill|East Japan Railway Company|en|East Japan Railway Company|qid=Q499071|lt=East Japan Railway Company|1=East Japan Railway Company}} {{ill|Takasaki Line|en|Takasaki Line|qid=Q1346657|lt=Takasaki Line|1=Takasaki Line}} {{ill|Fukaya Station|en|Fukaya Station|qid=Q844895|lt=Fukaya Station|1=Fukaya Station}}より徒歩2分 |URL = http://www.fukaya-ta.com/matsuri/fukayamatsuri/ }}
The '''{{ill|Fukaya Festival|ja|深谷まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukaya Festival|qq=}}''' is a summer festival held in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|qid=Q734532|lt=Fukaya, Saitama|1=Fukaya, Saitama}}, '''Saitama Prefecture''', featuring a '''{{ill|Mikoshi|en|Mikoshi|qid=Q979940|lt=Mikoshi|1=Mikoshi}} parade''', where spectators splash water onto the '''mikoshi''' as a traditional ritual.<ref name="fukaya">[http://www.fukaya-ta.com/matsuri/fukayamatsuri/ 深谷市観光協会]</ref>
== Overview == The festival traces its origins back to '''1681''' ({{ill|Tenna (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442381}} 1), when the '''Three Deities of Tenno''' ('''Benzaiten''', '''Daikokuten''', and '''Gozu Tennō''') enshrined in '''Fukaya Castle''' were relocated to '''Aioi Town''' and rededicated as '''{{ill|Yasaka Shrine|en|Yasaka Shrine|qid=Q692714|lt=Yasaka Shrine (Japan)|1=Yasaka Shrine}}''', initiating the '''"Yasaka Festival"''' (八坂まつり). The festival has been celebrated for over '''300 years'''.
The highlight of the festival is the '''mikoshi parade''', featuring '''over ten participating neighborhood associations'''. Due to Fukaya's '''hot summer climate''', it has become a local tradition to '''splash water on the mikoshi''' as they are carried through the streets.<ref name="fukaya"/> Additionally, each neighborhood displays '''floats''' and '''festival music'''.<ref name=":0">{{Cite web |title=第29回深谷まつり｜深谷市観光協会 |url=http://www.fukaya-ta.com/matsurifukayamatsuri/ |website=www.fukaya-ta.com |access-date=2024-08-01}}</ref>
The '''"Yasaka Shrine Summer Grand Festival"''' (八坂神社夏季大祭), held on the '''last Friday, Saturday, and Sunday of July''', is sometimes '''considered part of the Fukaya Festival''', leading to mixed usage of the names '''"Yasaka Festival"''' and '''"Fukaya Festival."'''<ref>[http://www.saitama-np.co.jp/news/2015/07/10/08.html 100th year ぶり屋台新造 埼玉新聞]</ref>
== Participating Neighborhood Associations<ref name=":0" /> == * Inari-cho Neighborhood Association (稲荷町自治会) * Honzumi-cho Neighborhood Association (本住町自治会) * Naka-cho Neighborhood Association (仲町自治会) * Honmachi Neighborhood Association (本町自治会) * Aioi-cho Neighborhood Association (相生町自治会) * Tadokoro-cho Neighborhood Association (田所町自治会) * Nishijima-cho Neighborhood Association (西島町自治会) * Tenjin-cho Neighborhood Association (天神町自治会) * Sakae-cho Neighborhood Association (栄町自治会) * Nishikicho Neighborhood Association (錦町自治会) * Nishi-Ōnuma Neighborhood Association (西大沼自治会) * Higashi-Ōnuma Neighborhood Association (東大沼自治会)
Among these, '''Inari-cho to Nishijima-cho (7 neighborhoods)''' take turns as the '''"lead neighborhood"''' each year.
== Date & Location == * Held on the '''last Saturday of July''', in conjunction with the '''Yasaka Festival''' (last Friday to Sunday of July). * Example: '''20th Fukaya Festival''', July 25, 2015 (10:00 AM – 9:30 PM planned). * Venue: '''JR Fukaya Station North Exit area'''.<ref name="fukaya"/>
== History == * '''1681''' (Tenna 1) – First recorded Yasaka Festival. * '''July 25, 2015''' – 20th Fukaya Festival.<ref name="fukaya"/>
== Organizer == * '''Fukaya City Tourism Association''' (深谷市観光協会)
== Access == * '''2-minute walk from JR Fukaya Station''' (Takasaki Line, East Japan Railway Company).
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.fukaya-ta.com/matsuri/fukayamatsuri/ Fukaya Festival – Fukaya Tourism Association] * [https://fukayamatsuri.com Fukaya Festival Official Website]
